title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Specsmakers South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Specsmakers South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Specsmakers South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About Specsmakers South Asia Partners:
Specsmakers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers South Asia Partners!
